title: Keeper (corvette group)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Keeper}}
'''''Keeper''''' was a pair of [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. They were fitted with explosives and were attempting to destroy the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught]] ''[[Dargon]]'' through crashing into the ship. The attempt was foiled by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] in a [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]].
